task_completion.description: Verify the meeting subject is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a meeting creation or edit form in Odoo with the Subject or Meeting Name field containing exactly 'Q2 Performance Debrief with CFO'.

task_completion.description: Verify both required attendees are included.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Attendees field in the meeting form. It must contain both 'Grace Patel' and 'Frank Rivera'.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting is scheduled for next Thursday at 14:00 for 1 hour.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Start Date/Time field showing next Thursday's date at 14:00 (or 2:00 PM) and the End Date/Time at 15:00 (or 3:00 PM), or a duration field showing 1 hour.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting location is set correctly.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Location field in the meeting form containing 'Executive Boardroom'.

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting description contains the required details.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Description or Notes text area containing the keywords 'Q2', 'performance', and 'retention' (e.g., 'Review Q2 department performance outcomes and discuss talent retention strategy...').

task_completion.description: Verify the meeting has been successfully saved or scheduled.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a saved event summary page (not in edit mode) or the calendar view showing the 'Q2 Performance Debrief with CFO' event block on next Thursday at 14:00.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the Odoo web GUI to schedule the meeting.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Odoo interface (Contacts or Calendar modules), not a terminal window executing API or database commands.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual Odoo application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The interface should clearly be the Odoo ERP system, not a text editor, mock webpage, or notes application.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not use Python scripts or terminal commands to bypass the UI.
integrity.visual_evidence: There should be no visible terminal windows running scripts to insert the calendar event directly into the database.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The meeting subject must be exactly 'Q2 Performance Debrief with CFO'. The attendees must include 'Grace Patel' and 'Frank Rivera'. The location must be 'Executive Boardroom'. The description must contain the keywords 'Q2', 'performance', and 'retention'. The meeting must be scheduled for next Thursday at 14:00 (2:00 PM) for 1 hour.
